prestazioni: Forced induction conversion using a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 0.64 A/R turbine housing) on the **L15B 1.5L DOHC VTEC Turbo (Earth Dreams)** engine, paired with a **Hondata KPro4 ECU** for direct fuel and ignition mapping to handle 18 psi of boost (stock internals safe limit). Includes a **PRL Motorsports intercooler core upgrade** (2.5" thick, 12" x 12" x 4.5" dimensions) and **GReddy Type-S blow-off valve** (adjustable dual-stage) to prevent compressor surge.

Full **BC Racing BR Type ER coilover suspension** with **Swift Springs** (8K front, 7K rear spring rates) and **Ohlins DFV dampers** (rebound/compression adjustable) for chassis rigidity. Includes **Cusco 22mm front sway bar** and **Ultra Racing 18mm rear sway bar** to reduce body roll, paired with **Honda OEM 5x114.3 to 4x100 hub conversion** for **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** (18x8 +35) wheels with **Yokohama Advan A052** (225/40R18) tires.

Exhaust system overhaul with **HKS Hi-Power Spec-L 3" stainless steel downpipe** (catless, 304-grade) and **Spoon Sports N1 muffler** (dual 3.5" outlets, 70mm tip diameter) for optimal scavenging. Includes a **Toda Racing high-flow catalytic converter** (200-cell, 3" inlet/outlet) and **AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge** (0-5V output) for real-time air-fuel monitoring.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Stepwgn-specific widebody kit** (FRP construction, 50mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser** (polyurethane, 3-piece design). Painted in **PPG Honda Milano Red (R-81M) with matte black accents** (3M 1080 vinyl wrap).

**JDM-spec Stepwgn front bumper lip** (OEM Honda part #71100-TZA-A01ZZ) with **C-West carbon fiber canards** (2-piece, 150mm length) and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (2.5m chord, 300mm height, adjustable angle). Includes **LED headlight conversion** (Morimoto XB LED projectors, 5500K color temp) and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights** (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals).

**Recaro SR-7F seats** (fixed-back, carbon-Kevlar shell) with **Takata 4-point harnesses** (Schroth Profi II) and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm diameter, suede grip). Interior wrapped in **Nismo Alcantara door cards** (custom stitching) and **Sparco pedals** (aluminum, 6061-T6 construction). Includes **Kenwood Excelon DMX906S** head unit (Apple CarPlay/Android Auto) with **Focal Utopia Be 165 WU speakers** (6.5" woofers, 1" tweeters) and **JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer** (10", sealed enclosure).
